title: Is animal-based the optimal human diet? A conversation with Georgi Dinkov

chunks.title: Introduction to Animal-Based Diet
chunks.summary: The podcast introduces the concept of an animal-based diet, suggesting that ruminant meats and ripe fruit are what humans are naturally inclined to thrive on. The host sets the stage for a conversation with Georgie Dinkov, highlighting the topics they'll cover, including serotonin and its effects on behavior.

chunks.title: Practical Advice on Nutrition
chunks.summary: In the closing segment, actionable dietary advice is given, encouraging a focus on high-quality animal fats, including stearic acid, and limiting polyunsaturated fats. The hosts suggest incorporating saturated fats to balance the diet.
